articles.title: Child-rape sentence reignites scrutiny of UK high street mini-marts
articles.description: Rapist Bawan Harwe lured underage girls back to his flat with the promise of free vapes and cash.

articles.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes, scientists say
articles.description: An El Niño event has officially started, say US scientists, raising fears of extreme weather and higher temperatures.

articles.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX valued at nearly $1.8tn ahead of record share sale
articles.description: The public sale is also expected to make Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire.

articles.title: 'Mum was killing me': England's Declan Rice on sunburn for his World Cup photoshoot
articles.description: The Arsenal midfielder admits he was a touch pink in pre-tournament photos as players try to adjust to scorching conditions.
